name: cato-mcp
description: Absolute doctrine for tokenized settlement governance — multi-chain eFICC settlement router for TradFi/DeFi convergence (Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Solana, Fed L1 pending). v0.2.3 adds sticky CoinGecko price cache; v0.2.2 restored the SOFR 1-day delta funding-shock detector validated against the September 2019 repo spike.
